MEVTS Menus
=========

MEVTS Menus Folder is maintained within the project:
	.\Debug\Menus

Currently, menus assume default installation path:
	C:\T32\demo\arc\scripts

update_mevts_menu.bat:
----------------
	Run update_mevts_menu.bat to copy Menus in current folder to installation path (will overwrite menu in destination).


upload_mevts_instalation_to_ladjfs.bat:
---------------------------------------
	Run upload_mevts_instalation_to_ladjfs.bat to upload Working Copy of Menus to ladjfs.jer.intel.com\hwfw\Software\Trace32\XtensaAddon\MEVTS
	This is useful to give Menus access to teams without FW git permissions (like SV and EMU)
